evals.name: status-happy-path
evals.prompt: Check bridge readiness for this project.
evals.expected_output: Status report with Portfolio Readiness, TIPS Readiness, Industry Alignment, and Bridge Readiness sections. Portfolio Context line shows v3.2 from the exported context file.

assertions.name: reports-v3.2-context
assertions.text: Output's Portfolio Context line reports 'v3.2' (not v3.1, not missing).

assertions.name: readiness-ladder-pruned
assertions.text: Output does NOT enumerate v1.0 or v2.0 in the Portfolio Context readiness line (pruned to v3.2/v3.1/v3.0/missing).

assertions.name: industry-alignment-reported
assertions.text: Output includes an Industry Alignment section with one of EXACT/VERTICAL/BROAD/NONE.

assertions.name: both-directions-ready
assertions.text: Bridge Readiness reports both portfolio-to-tips AND tips-to-portfolio as READY given the fixture has products, features, propositions, value model with ranked STs.

evals.name: portfolio-to-tips-with-named-customers
evals.expected_output: portfolio-context.json written into the TIPS project directory with schema_version 3.2 and a non-empty named_customer_references[] populated from named_customers[].

assertions.name: named-customer-refs-non-empty
assertions.text: named_customer_references[] array has at least one entry.

assertions.name: fit-score-canonical-enum
assertions.text: Every named_customer_references[].fit_score is a string from the set {"high", "medium", "low"} — never a float, never a percentage.

assertions.name: feature-slugs-empty
assertions.text: Every named_customer_references[].feature_slugs is an empty array [] (v3.2 reserved).

assertions.name: customer-name-from-name-field
assertions.text: Every named_customer_references[].customer_name matches the canonical named_customers[].name field (not company_name, not key_pain_points-derived).

assertions.name: no-web-origin-prose
assertions.text: Every outcome_summary is traceable to pain_points or fit_rationale in the fixture named_customers[] — no invented company history, no web-sourced claims.

evals.name: portfolio-to-tips-missing-customers
evals.expected_output: Bridge runs successfully despite the fixture having no customers/ directory at all. portfolio-context.json v3.2 is written with named_customer_references: [] and Step 4 summary reports 0 references.

assertions.name: no-crash
assertions.text: Bridge completes without raising an error, returning a written portfolio-context.json.

assertions.name: named-customer-refs-empty-array
assertions.text: Written portfolio-context.json has "named_customer_references": [] at the top level (empty array, not missing, not null).

assertions.name: schema-still-v3.2
assertions.text: schema_version is still "3.2" even when no customers source exists — the empty array is the backward-compatible signal.

assertions.name: step-4-reports-zero
assertions.text: Step 4 summary reports '0 named customer references' (or equivalent zero-count line).
